title: Week 05 - Factors, Multiples, and Prime Numbers

questions.title: Check Whether a Number Is Prime

description.statement: Return true if n is a prime number.
description.output: true for prime numbers, otherwise false.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(n)
    if n < 2 then
        return false
    end
    for i = 2, n - 1 do
        if n % i == 0 then
            return false
        end
    end
    return true
end
